description_long: This is a low-cut, lace-up shoe with a rounded toe and a slightly rugged, textured sole. The upper appears to be made of dark leather or synthetic material, featuring subtle stitching details along the sides and around the lace eyelets. The shoe has a padded collar for comfort and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The outsole is moderately thick with a visible tread pattern, suggesting good grip for urban walking. The laces are standard and match the color of the upper, while the midsole has a contrasting brown edge. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A dark, low-cut lace-up shoe with a rugged sole, padded collar, and subtle stitching, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, stitching details, and the brown-edged sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, lacing, and slight curvature of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the padded collar, stitching, and sole profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel, pull tab, and the back seam.
